---
title: "Academics"
bibliography: CBontemps.bib
csl: chicago-author-date.csl
toc: false
---

## Research

My research interests lie at the intersection of econometrics, data science, machine learning, and data visualization, with applications to official statistics, environmental economics, and public policy.

---

## Selected Publications

### Data Visualization & Data Science

- @bontemps2024dataviz
- @orozco2020make
- @bontemps2021FAIR

### Econometrics

- @bontemps2018econometrics
- @bontemps2015nonparametric

### Environmental & Food Economics

- @bontemps2014food
- @bontemps2012environment

---

## Books

- @bontempsbook2019
- @bontempsbook2015

---

## Conference Papers & Talks

- @bontemps2020porto
- @bontemps2019howtolie

---

## Full Bibliography

::: {.references}
:::
